record_id.description: Stable identifier for this evidence row.

subject.description: What claim or component this evidence supports or refutes.

evidence_state.description: verified = evidence present and checked; unverified = partial or pending; missing = no evidence (must not be treated as success).

evidence_ref.description: Paths to logs, MATRIX rows, reports, or commands.

verification_output.description: Short summary of last command or review outcome.
